facebook.content: "A recent trend in modern spirituality reveals a resurgence of mystical practices, blurring the lines between biblical truth and ancient occult traditions. As followers of Christ, we must discern the enemy's tactics to deceive and manipulate. In our upcoming Kingdom Report newsletter, we'll examine the spiritual battlegrounds in the realm of mysticism and provide guidance on navigating this treacherous landscape.
